service.description: Extract Shopify orders for an automation window through Shopify Bulk Operations and write normalized JSON output to the automation data-manager folder.

parameter.name: shopifyAuthConfigId
parameter.description: Tenant-owned ShopifyAuthConfig identifier.

parameter.name: automationId
parameter.description: Automation id passed through for metadata.

parameter.name: automationExecutionId
parameter.description: Automation execution id used to choose the default data-manager output folder.

parameter.name: companyUserGroupId
parameter.description: Trusted automation owner tenant. When present, config access is checked against this tenant instead of a user-session active tenant.

parameter.name: fileSide
parameter.description: Logical file side being extracted.

parameter.name: systemEnumId
parameter.description: Source system identifier passed through for metadata.

parameter.name: sourceTypeEnumId
parameter.description: Source type identifier passed through for metadata.

parameter.name: windowStart
parameter.description: Start of the automation window; accepts Timestamp, Date, ISO-8601 text, SQL timestamp text, or epoch milliseconds.

parameter.name: windowEnd
parameter.description: End of the automation window; accepts Timestamp, Date, ISO-8601 text, SQL timestamp text, or epoch milliseconds.

parameter.name: preserveWindowInstants
parameter.description: When true, treat windowStart and windowEnd as already normalized instants instead of reinterpreting UTC-midnight values through the Shopify config timezone.

parameter.name: windowStartDate
parameter.description: Raw parent window start passed by the automation executor.

parameter.name: windowEndDate
parameter.description: Raw parent window end passed by the automation executor.

parameter.name: outputLocation
parameter.description: Optional output directory. Defaults to runtime://datamanager/reconciliation-runs/{automationExecutionId}/{timestamp}/.

parameter.name: fileName
parameter.description: Optional output file name. Defaults to shopify-orders-{fromMillis}-{thruMillis}.json.

parameter.name: connectTimeoutMillis
parameter.description: HTTP connect timeout for Shopify GraphQL and Bulk Operations download requests.

parameter.name: readTimeoutMillis
parameter.description: HTTP read timeout for Shopify GraphQL and Bulk Operations download requests.

parameter.name: maxAttempts
parameter.description: Maximum attempts for retryable Shopify GraphQL transport failures.

parameter.name: maxPages
parameter.description: Deprecated cursor-pagination guard retained for existing callers; Bulk Operations extraction uses maxBulkPollAttempts instead.

parameter.name: maxBulkPollAttempts
parameter.description: Maximum Shopify Bulk Operations status polls before the extraction fails.

parameter.name: bulkPollIntervalMillis
parameter.description: Delay between Shopify Bulk Operations status polls.

parameter.name: bulkStartRetryAttempts
parameter.description: Number of retries when Shopify rejects the start request because another Bulk Operation is already running.

parameter.name: bulkStartRetryDelayMillis
parameter.description: Delay between Bulk Operation start retries when another operation is already running.
